Class SMTRuleApp

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<SMTRule>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<SMTRule>
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTRuleApp
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp
@NullMarked public class SMTRuleApp extends AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<SMTRule>
The rule application that is used when a goal is closed by means of an SMT solver. So far it stores the rule that that has been used and a title containing some information for the user.

  • Field Summary

    • tryToInstantiate

      public SMTRuleApp tryToInstantiate(Goal goal)
      Create a new RuleApp with the same pio (in this case, that will probably be null as the SMT rule is applied to the complete sequent) as this one. Add all top level formulas of the goal to the RuleApp's ifInsts.
      Specified by:
      tryToInstantiate in interface IBuiltInRuleApp
      Specified by:
      tryToInstantiate in class AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<SMTRule>
      Parameters:
      goal - the goal to instantiate the current RuleApp on
      Returns:
      a new RuleApp with the same pio and all top level formulas of the goal as ifInsts
